name: English Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the yeast in the scalded milk.
2. Add sugar and salt to the yeast mixture.
3. Gradually add flour until a drop batter forms.
4. Beat thoroughly and set aside in a warm place to rise.
5. Stir in the egg and baking soda, beating well.
6. Pour the batter into muffin rings or onto a hot griddle.
7. Cook slowly on one side, then turn and cook the other side.
8. Serve with butter or butter substitute and syrup.
- 18 muffins.
